title: Harry Potter
description: How well do you know the wizarding world? Take this 20-question Harry Potter trivia quiz on Hogwarts, spells and characters.
seoIntro: The world of Harry Potter is built for trivia. Across seven books and eight films, fans soak up an enormous amount of detail — the Hogwarts houses and their founders, spells and what they do, magical creatures, professors, and the long fight against Voldemort. This quiz pulls from across that whole universe to see how much of the wizarding world you really remember.
seoDetail: Strong Harry Potter questions move between the books and the films, from the Sorting Hat and Quidditch to Horcruxes, the Order of the Phoenix, and the Deathly Hallows. The series rewards casual viewers who know the main story beats just as much as readers who remember small character moments and the rules of magic.

title: Pokémon
description: Think you're a Pokémon Master? Test yourself with 20 trivia questions on types, regions, evolutions and legendaries.
seoIntro: Few franchises pack as much memorable detail as Pokémon. Between the games, the anime, and decades of new generations, fans hold on to starter Pokémon, type match-ups, Gym Leaders, legendary creatures, and the long road to becoming a Champion. This quiz tests how much of that has actually stuck.
seoDetail: A good Pokémon quiz can stretch from the original Kanto region to the newest games — evolutions, abilities, regions, rivals, and the creatures that became mascots for the whole series. It works because players tend to remember both the big milestones and oddly specific facts about who evolves from what.

title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
description: Water. Earth. Fire. Air. A 20-question Avatar: The Last Airbender quiz on the four nations, bending and Team Avatar.
seoIntro: Avatar: The Last Airbender turned a story about a hundred-year war into one of the most rewatched animated series around. Fans remember the four nations, the bending arts, Aang's journey, and a supporting cast that grows across three seasons. This quiz draws on all of it.
seoDetail: The best Avatar questions range across the Water, Earth, Fire, and Air nations, from Team Avatar and the Fire Nation's leaders to bending styles, spirit-world lore, and the show's biggest turning points. It rewards viewers who paid attention to both the comedy and the heavier moments of the war.

title: Breaking Bad
description: Say my name. A 20-question Breaking Bad trivia quiz on Walter White, Jesse and the fall across all five seasons.
seoIntro: Breaking Bad turned a high-school chemistry teacher into one of television's most talked-about characters, and fans followed the slow transformation in detail. From Walter White and Jesse Pinkman to the cooks, the cars, and the consequences, this quiz tests how closely you watched the descent.
seoDetail: A strong Breaking Bad quiz moves through all five seasons — the partnership at the heart of the show, the rivals and family caught in the fallout, memorable lines, and small details that pay off later. The series rewards viewers who tracked how one decision led straight into the next.

title: Friends
description: Could you BE any better at this? A 20-question Friends quiz on Ross, Rachel, Central Perk and ten seasons of jokes.
seoIntro: Decades after it first aired, Friends is still endlessly quotable, and fans remember the six characters like people they actually knew. This quiz pulls from ten seasons of coffee-shop hangouts, on-and-off romances, running jokes, and unforgettable one-liners.
seoDetail: Good Friends questions cover Ross, Rachel, Monica, Chandler, Joey, and Phoebe, plus Central Perk, the Thanksgiving episodes, and the catchphrases that slipped into everyday speech. It works because casual viewers and superfans alike tend to remember the show's biggest moments.

title: Game of Thrones
description: When you play, you win or you die. 20 Game of Thrones trivia questions on houses, characters and Westeros.
seoIntro: Game of Thrones built a world so dense that fans still argue over its details. Houses, alliances, betrayals, dragons, and a sprawling cast give this quiz plenty to draw on — and plenty of ways to trip you up.
seoDetail: A strong Game of Thrones quiz ranges across Westeros and Essos, from the great houses and their sigils to the Iron Throne, the Night's Watch, and the major deaths that defined each season. It rewards viewers who kept track of the shifting alliances and the long list of claimants to the throne.

title: Lord of The Rings
description: One quiz to rule them all. 20 Lord of the Rings questions on the Fellowship, Middle-earth and the One Ring.
seoIntro: The Lord of the Rings gave fans a world with its own history, languages, and geography, and the films cemented it for a new generation. This quiz travels from the Shire to Mordor, testing how much of Middle-earth you carry with you.
seoDetail: Good Lord of the Rings questions cover the Fellowship, the races of Middle-earth, the key battles, and the long journey of the One Ring. It works because the story is full of named characters, places, and moments that fans remember vividly from both the books and the films.

title: Naruto
description: Believe it! Test yourself with 20 Naruto trivia questions on the Hidden Leaf, jutsu, clans and Team 7.
seoIntro: Naruto follows a young ninja's path from outcast to hero, and fans remember the villages, jutsu, and rivalries that fill hundreds of episodes. This quiz tests how well you know the Hidden Leaf and everything around it.
seoDetail: A strong Naruto quiz covers Team 7, the Hidden Villages, the major clans, and the battles that shaped the series. It rewards viewers who followed both the early Academy days and the larger conflicts, along with the jutsu and bonds that drive the story.

title: Star Wars
description: May the Force be with you. A 20-question Star Wars quiz on Jedi, the Empire and a galaxy far, far away.
seoIntro: Star Wars spans films, series, and decades of lore, and fans remember the galaxy far, far away in remarkable detail. From the Force to the Empire, this quiz draws on the saga that started it all and everything it grew into.
seoDetail: Good Star Wars questions move across the original trilogy, the prequels, the sequels, and the shows — Jedi and Sith, droids, ships, and the families at the centre of the story. It works because the saga is packed with iconic characters and lines that fans know by heart.

title: Stranger Things
description: Welcome to Hawkins. Take 20 Stranger Things trivia questions on the Upside Down, the kids and every season.
seoIntro: Stranger Things mixes 80s nostalgia, small-town mystery, and monsters from another dimension, and fans track its details across every season. This quiz heads back to Hawkins to test what you remember.
seoDetail: A strong Stranger Things quiz covers the central group of kids, the Upside Down, the town of Hawkins, and the threats that escalate each season. It rewards viewers who followed the friendships, the supernatural lore, and the 80s references woven through the show.

title: The Office
description: That's what she said. A 20-question The Office quiz on Dunder Mifflin, Michael Scott and the Scranton crew.
seoIntro: The Office turned an ordinary paper company into a comedy fans quote constantly. From Michael Scott's antics to the Jim-and-Pam romance, this quiz pulls from nine seasons at Dunder Mifflin.
seoDetail: Good Office questions cover the Scranton branch, its managers and salespeople, the pranks, and the mockumentary moments that made it famous. It works because viewers remember both the big arcs and the tiny throwaway lines that became iconic.

title: Disney
description: Test your Disney magic with 20 trivia questions on classic films, princesses, villains and unforgettable songs.
seoIntro: Disney's films span nearly a century, from hand-drawn classics to modern blockbusters, and fans grow up memorising the characters, songs, and stories. This quiz draws on the whole magical catalogue.
seoDetail: A strong Disney quiz moves across the animated classics, the princesses, the villains, the sidekicks, and the songs everyone knows. It works because Disney films are shared across generations, so players remember details from movies they watched as kids and again as adults.

title: The Big Bang Theory
description: Bazinga! A 20-question The Big Bang Theory quiz on Sheldon, the gang and twelve seasons of jokes.
seoIntro: The Big Bang Theory built a hit comedy around a group of scientists and their neighbour, and fans remember the running gags, relationships, and catchphrases. This quiz pulls from twelve seasons of the gang.
seoDetail: Good Big Bang Theory questions cover the friends and their careers, the apartment across the hall, the comic-book and science references, and the romances that develop over the years. It rewards viewers who followed both the jokes and the characters' growth.

title: How I Met Your Mother
description: Suit up. Take 20 How I Met Your Mother trivia questions on Ted, the gang, MacLaren's and the running jokes.
seoIntro: How I Met Your Mother framed a long love story around a group of friends in New York, and fans remember its running jokes and slow-building twists. This quiz tests how well you followed Ted's story.
seoDetail: A strong How I Met Your Mother quiz covers the core group, the bar they always return to, the catchphrases, and the long mystery the show builds toward. It works because viewers remember both the comedy and the clues dropped across the seasons.

title: Rick and Morty
description: Wubba lubba dub dub. A 20-question Rick and Morty quiz on the multiverse, the Smith family and more.
seoIntro: Rick and Morty pairs a reckless genius with his anxious grandson for trips across the multiverse, and fans track its dense lore and references. This quiz dives into the chaos.
seoDetail: Good Rick and Morty questions cover the family, the endless alternate dimensions, the recurring characters, and the show's biggest episodes. It rewards viewers who paid attention to the continuity hidden inside all the sci-fi absurdity.

title: Demon Slayer
description: Take 20 Demon Slayer trivia questions on the Corps, the Hashira, breathing styles and the demons.
seoIntro: Demon Slayer follows a young fighter's quest to save his sister and avenge his family, and fans remember its breathing styles, demons, and battles. This quiz tests your knowledge of the Demon Slayer Corps.
seoDetail: A strong Demon Slayer quiz covers the Corps, the Hashira, the breathing techniques, and the demons standing in the way. It rewards viewers who followed both the emotional core of the story and the details of each major fight.

title: One Piece
description: Set sail with 20 One Piece trivia questions on the Straw Hats, Devil Fruits and the Grand Line.
seoIntro: One Piece has grown into one of the longest and most detailed adventures in anime, following a crew chasing the ultimate treasure. Fans remember its islands, crews, and powers across a huge run, and this quiz draws on that vast world.
seoDetail: Good One Piece questions cover the Straw Hat crew, Devil Fruits, the seas they sail, and the allies and enemies they meet along the way. It works because the series is packed with named characters and arcs that dedicated fans know in depth.

title: Attack on Titan
description: A 20-question Attack on Titan quiz on the Survey Corps, the walls, the Titans and the biggest twists.
seoIntro: Attack on Titan turns a story about walled cities and towering Titans into a layered mystery, and fans track its many twists. This quiz tests how closely you followed the war beyond the walls.
seoDetail: A strong Attack on Titan quiz covers the Survey Corps, the walls, the Titans, and the revelations that reshape the story. It rewards viewers who kept up with the shifting alliances and the secrets revealed across the seasons.

title: Minecraft
description: Test your survival skills with 20 Minecraft trivia questions on crafting, mobs, biomes and the Nether.
seoIntro: Minecraft became one of the best-selling games ever by letting players build whole worlds block by block, and fans know its crafting, mobs, and mechanics inside out. This quiz tests your survival knowledge.
seoDetail: Good Minecraft questions cover crafting recipes, mobs, biomes, ores, and the dimensions players explore. It works because the game rewards detailed knowledge — from how to brew a potion to which mobs spawn where.

title: Squid Game
description: Red light, green light. Take 20 Squid Game trivia questions on the players, the games and the twists.
seoIntro: Squid Game turned childhood games into a deadly competition and became a global phenomenon. Fans remember its players, rounds, and twists, and this quiz tests what you recall from the contest.
seoDetail: A strong Squid Game quiz covers the players, the games themselves, the people running the contest, and the turns that shocked viewers. It works because the show's rules and reveals stuck with audiences long after they watched.

title: Money Heist
description: Bella ciao. A 20-question Money Heist quiz on the Professor, the crew and the biggest robberies.
seoIntro: Money Heist follows a crew pulling off audacious robberies under code names, and fans track every plan and betrayal. This quiz tests how well you followed the heist.
seoDetail: Good Money Heist questions cover the Professor and his team, the city-named members, the targets they hit, and the plans that go right and wrong. It rewards viewers who followed the strategy and the relationships under pressure.

title: The Mandalorian
description: This is the way. Take 20 The Mandalorian trivia questions on Mando, Grogu and the Star Wars galaxy.
seoIntro: The Mandalorian brought a lone bounty hunter and a mysterious child to the Star Wars galaxy, and fans remember its characters and corners of the universe. This quiz heads to the Outer Rim.
seoDetail: A strong Mandalorian quiz covers the bounty hunter's code, the allies and enemies he meets, the planets he visits, and the wider Star Wars connections. It rewards viewers who followed both the standalone adventures and the larger story.

title: The Walking Dead
description: A 20-question The Walking Dead trivia quiz on the survivors, the communities and the walkers.
seoIntro: The Walking Dead followed survivors through a world overrun by walkers across many seasons, and fans remember the groups, leaders, and losses. This quiz tests how well you survived alongside them.
seoDetail: Good Walking Dead questions cover the core survivors, the communities they build, the threats they face, and the deaths that changed the story. It rewards viewers who tracked the shifting leadership and the long fight to stay alive.

title: The Last of Us
description: Take 20 The Last of Us trivia questions on Joel, Ellie, the infected and the journey across a broken world.
seoIntro: The Last of Us tells a story of survival and connection in a ruined world, and fans remember its journey in detail. This quiz draws on the game's characters, places, and hardest moments.
seoDetail: A strong Last of Us quiz covers the main characters, the infected, the factions, and the cross-country journey at the heart of the story. It works because the game is remembered as much for its emotional beats as for its setting.

title: Seinfeld
description: No soup for you! A 20-question Seinfeld quiz on Jerry, George, Elaine, Kramer and the show about nothing.
seoIntro: Seinfeld built a classic comedy around the small absurdities of everyday life, and fans still quote its episodes. This quiz pulls from the show about nothing.
seoDetail: Good Seinfeld questions cover the four main characters, their New York haunts, the running gags, and the episodes that became cultural touchstones. It works because the humour came from tiny situations that viewers remember by name.
